summary: Git shows 'nothing to commit' despite code changes being made in Kiro. This indicates either: 1) Changes weren't actually saved to local files, 2) Files are in .gitignore, or 3) Git state is out of sync. Need to verify local files contain the changes and check git configuration.
current_status: Deployment blocked - git not detecting changes. Need to verify local file contents and git status before proceeding with commit and push.
